_info: Raw API responses — overwritten on each new analysis

dense_captions.text: a white letter on a grey background
a close up of a logo

llm_raw.summary: The image contains the ZONNIC logo, detected via OCR and captions, but is missing all required regulatory elements: no nicotine warning (bilingual), no 18+ icon, and no risk communication text are present. Logo presence is confirmed, but colour, C halo, and background compliance cannot be fully verified from available signals and require manual review. Most other checks pass or require manual review due to vision limitations.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning text (English or French) detected at the top of the image. Violates REG-01, REG-04, REG-05.
No '18+' icon or text detected anywhere in the image. Violates REG-02.
No risk communication text detected at the bottom of the image. Violates REG-03, REG-04.
ZONNIC text detected via OCR at (75,27)-(244,65) with 98.9% confidence. Logo presence confirmed (LOGO-01).

Unable to verify logo text colour or background brightness from available signals — colour analysis not available. Requires manual review for LOGO-03, LOGO-06, LOGO-08, LOGO-10, LOGOBG-DONT-06, LOGOBG-DONT-07.

Unable to verify C halo presence, colour, or shape from available signals — shape and colour analysis not available. Requires manual review for LOGO-DONT-01, LOGO-DONT-02, LOGO-DONT-04, LOGO-DONT-14, LOGO-DONT-15.

Unable to verify logo gradients, outlines, stacking, or distortion from available signals — visual analysis not available. Requires manual review for LOGO-13, LOGO-DONT-05, LOGO-DONT-07, LOGO-DONT-13.

Background described as 'grey' in dense captions, but unable to confirm gradient or image/light/dark from available signals — colour/background classification not available. Requires manual review for LOGO-02, LOGO-05, LOGO-07, LOGO-09.
Unable to verify gradient direction, split, or logo position from available signals — gradient analysis and object position not available. Requires manual review for GRAD-01, GRAD-02, GRAD-03.

Content type inferred as 'unknown' (logo only). Unable to verify background match from available signals — content classification and colour analysis not available. Requires manual review for CONTENT-01, CONTENT-02, CONTENT-03, CONTENT-DONT-01, CONTENT-DONT-02, CONTENT-DONT-04.
Unable to verify colour palette usage from available signals — dominant colour and colour matching not available. Requires manual review for COLOR-01, COLOR-02, COLOR-03, COLOR-04.
Font name/weight not detectable from available signals. Requires manual review for TYPO-01, TYPO-02, TYPO-03, LOGO-14, LOGO-15.
Unable to verify grey gradient opacity or format from available signals — colour/opacity analysis not available. Requires manual review for GRAD-04, CONTENT-DONT-03.
Unable to verify logo safety zone or minimum size from available signals — object detection/spatial analysis not available. Requires manual review for LOGO-11, LOGO-12.

Unable to verify halo/background colour blending, flavour mismatch, or logo in shapes from available signals — colour/shape analysis not available. Requires manual review for LOGOBG-DONT-01, LOGOBG-DONT-02, LOGOBG-DONT-03, LOGOBG-DONT-04, LOGOBG-DONT-05, LOGOBG-DONT-08.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement detected at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text matching 'WARNING:' or 'AVERTISSEMENT :' detected.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning at top, risk communication and 18+ icon at bottom) are missing.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and the risk communication text and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No OCR text or icon detected at top or bottom of image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text matching 'WARNING:' or 'AVERTISSEMENT :' detected.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ icon detected in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text or icon matching '18+' detected.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text detected at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No OCR text matching 'This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.' detected.
